summary: All five requirements are implemented in the diff. REQ-1 is satisfied by useAdminAuth.ts with password 'debrajhero' and sessionStorage persistence. REQ-2 is satisfied by AdminPage.tsx with AdminPasswordGate wrapping AdminInbox and a logout button. REQ-3 is satisfied by AdminInbox.tsx with no II check, refresh button, loading/error/empty states, and all required fields displayed. REQ-4 is satisfied by backend/main.mo where getAllInquiries is a public query with no principal-based restriction. REQ-5 is satisfied by App.tsx with a dedicated /admin route rendering AdminPage.
